CreateDiagnosis.name: CreateDiagnosis
CreateDiagnosis.documentation: Creates a new diagnosis for debugging agent issues within a workspace job.

CreateTestAgentInstance.name: CreateTestAgentInstance
CreateTestAgentInstance.documentation: Creates a test agent instance with authorization token for local development. If jobId is omitted, a new test job is created automatically.

CreateTestConnector.name: CreateTestConnector
CreateTestConnector.documentation: Creates a test connector with same-account role, bypassing admin approval.

DeregisterAgent.name: DeregisterAgent
DeregisterAgent.documentation: Operation to deregister an agent. Completes synchronously when no active agent instances exist, or asynchronously with the force flag to stop running instances and fail associated jobs before cleanup.

GetAgent.name: GetAgent
GetAgent.documentation: Operation to access and view an agent's metadata and current configuration details.

GetAgentVersion.name: GetAgentVersion
GetAgentVersion.documentation: Returns version-specific information, including the latest version details or information about a specific version when requested

GetDiagnosis.name: GetDiagnosis
GetDiagnosis.documentation: Retrieves the status and result of a diagnosis.

ListAgentAccessControl.name: ListAgentAccessControl
ListAgentAccessControl.documentation: Operation that lists agent managed access controls, for agents with RESTRICTED visibility, this API lists all AWS accounts that have been granted access permissions

ListAgents.name: ListAgents
ListAgents.documentation: Operation that lists all agents available to the caller's account.

ListAgentsByPublisher.name: ListAgentsByPublisher
ListAgentsByPublisher.documentation: Operation that lists agents for the publisher account ID.

ListDiagnoses.name: ListDiagnoses
ListDiagnoses.documentation: Lists diagnoses for a given workspace, optionally filtered by job.

PublishAgentVersion.name: PublishAgentVersion
PublishAgentVersion.documentation: Operation publishing agent configurations necessary for agent invocation and management. Each version maintains distinct configuration settings

RegisterAgent.name: RegisterAgent
RegisterAgent.documentation: Operation to register a new agent with AWS Transform which creates the first version of agent.

UpdatePublisherAccessControl.name: UpdatePublisherAccessControl
UpdatePublisherAccessControl.documentation: Operation that allows an agent publishers to manage access control by adding or removing tenant AWS account IDs that can access their agents

ValidateAgentSetup.name: ValidateAgentSetup
ValidateAgentSetup.documentation: Validates that an agent is correctly set up and reachable.

notificationsEnabled.documentation: Notifications to the Partner team are enabled/disabled.

qualifier.documentation: Specific Qualifier to be used while invoking the runtime. If not specified, DEFAULT will be used.

stagingRuntimeArn.documentation: ARN of the staging AgentCore Runtime Resource

stagingQualifier.documentation: Specific Qualifier to be used while invoking the staging runtime.

stagingTrafficPercentage.documentation: Percentage of traffic to route to staging [0-100]

ownerContactInfo.documentation: Info about partner communication channels for any notifications about agent

visibility.documentation: Agent visibility status configured by the partner

recoveryWaitTimeSeconds.documentation: Number of seconds to wait for recovery.

maxRestores.documentation: Maximum number of times an agent instance can be restored in its lifecycle.

restoreWaitTimeSeconds.documentation: Number of seconds to wait between restore attempts.

version.documentation: Specific version to update. When provided, updates version-level metadata/status.

jobId.documentation: Optional. If omitted, a new test job is created. If provided, must be an existing dev test job owned by the caller.

agentType.documentation: Optional agent type. Defaults to ORCHESTRATOR_AGENT if not provided.

objective.documentation: Optional job objective. Used when creating a new test job.

force.documentation: When true, acknowledges active instances exist and triggers async deregistration. When false (default), rejects if active instances are found.

version.documentation: Defaults to latest active version if not provided
Specific version to update. When provided, updates version-level metadata/status.

chatUILabel.documentation: Short string to display agent name in the selection buttons of ATX chat.

chatAgentIdentifier.documentation: String used by agent for quick detection of capabilities in ATX chat.

partnerControllerRetryWindowMinutes.documentation: Number of minutes invocation service should continue retrying before failing with 5XX.

LegacyAgentResiliencyConfiguration.documentation: Configuration around the agent resiliency preferences of the partner agent.

includeDeprecated.documentation: Whether to include deprecated agents in the response.

bootstrapRoleArn.documentation: Used for MDE service to setup the container during launch by pulling ECR image etc. https://w.amazon.com/bin/view/Moontide/MDE/DeveloperGuide#HBootstrapRole

environmentRoleArn.documentation: Role used by MDE container during runtime. https://w.amazon.com/bin/view/Moontide/MDE/DeveloperGuide#HEnvironmentcredentials

stagingTrafficPercentage.documentation: Percentage of traffic to route to staging [0-100]

OwnerType.documentation: Represents the type of agent owner based on their relationship with ATX.

ownerContactInfo.documentation: Info about partner communication channels for any notifications about agent

customerConfigurationRequired.documentation: Indicates if the agent requires customer configuration before it can be used in a job.

customerConfiguredAgentDependencies.documentation: Only applicable for orchestrator agents. List of other agents which require customer configuration before the current orchestrator agent can be usable.

jobOrchestrator.documentation: Indicates if this agent serves as entry-point for jobs from ATX Chat

jobOrchestratorMetadata.documentation: Required additional data if agent is marked as job orchestrator

marketplaceMetadata.documentation: Only applicable for market place agents to get the metadata related to the market place registration

SemanticVersion.documentation: SemVer string restricted to 5 digits per group and only allowing suffix -dev. Also allows the special string latest

customerConfiguredAgentDependencies.documentation: Update the list of customer configured agent dependencies for the current agent

marketplaceMetadata.documentation: Only applicable for market place agents to get the metadata related to the market place registration

Stage.documentation: The service stage this client will connect to
